title: croton magdalenae
intro: Croton magdalenae, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family and is native to the Amazon region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its resinous sap. The health benefits of Croton magdalenae include wound healing, reducing inflammation and pain, and treating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the resinous sap is often extracted and used to create tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
